name: 6 Week Muffins
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Box Raisin Bran (or any bran flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare the batter by mixing together the raisin bran, sugar, flour, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the oil, eggs, and buttermilk mix until well combined.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Divide the batter evenly among muffin cups (about 12 per batch).
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. This recipe makes about 4 dozen muffins. You can use regular buttermilk if you prefer, or add extra buttermilk if available.
